query: SELECT sb.id, sb.title, COUNT(al.id) AS lib_count FROM scheduleBlocks sb LEFT JOIN assignments_library al ON al.block_id = sb.id WHERE sb.planId = 1200002 GROUP BY sb.id, sb.title;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT sb.id, sb.title, COUNT(al.id) AS lib_count FROM scheduleBlocks sb LEFT JOIN assignments_library al ON al.block_id = sb.id WHERE sb.planId = 1200002 GROUP BY sb.id, sb.title;
